_readme: Optional metadata, keyed by filename in src/photos. Every photo in the folder appears on the site whether it is listed here or not — add an entry only when you want extra detail. Fields: title (string), tags (array of strings), year (number — inferred automatically from a YYYY- filename prefix if omitted), caption (string — a short story shown on the photo's page), alt (string, for accessibility). Camera settings are read from the photo's EXIF automatically.

sample-01.jpg.title: Ridge line at dusk
sample-01.jpg.caption: Sample caption: a sentence or two about where and how the photograph was made appears here, beneath the title on the photo's own page.
